items.name_en: MiuMiu|New Retro Matte Small Square Bag
items.name_cn:
MiuMiu|New Retro Matte Small Square Bag
Concise and sharp design highlights functionality, soft matte embossed logo, and a grand bag silhouette. Minimalist with no excessive decoration, the bag has ample capacity, serving as a daily commuter bag or a short-trip travel companion. Simple yet not simplistic; almost every fashion blogger has one🌱
Size:22*10.5*7.5cm
Model:5BB142

items.name_en: Nappa gabardine texture mini bag~White fabric
items.name_cn:
Nappa gabardine texture mini bag~White fabric
This bag features gabardine fabric and a matching color embroidered logo, giving this small bag a versatile quality. A two-tone woven strap drawstring highlights the brand's authentic style.
~Zip closure
~Hook clasp woven drawstring shoulder strap
~Lined
~Embroidered letter logo
Size: W18.5×H14×D10cm
No.: 5NE841

items.name_en: New red color in stock
items.name_cn:
New red color in stock
Reproduction Miu Miu 5BB142, Miu's new bowling bag, officially promoted, this year's absolute hit🔥 style. Top-grade imported calfskin, Miu's unique Matelasse pattern. Exquisite, three-dimensional, and structured bag body. Front engraved logo echoes the leather color. Removable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap. Cotton satin lining, with zippered pocket. Many celebrities and influencers have the same style. Size: 22X10.5X7.5Cm, with original packaging
